The '''''Durastar''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] owned by the [[New Jedi Order]], and used by [[Daeshara'cor]] in the early months of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It suffered a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] failure near [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], forcing Daeshara'cor to abandon it.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
